title: palaquium macrophyllum
intro: Palaquium macrophyllum, also known as the large-leaved palaquium, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Palaquium macrophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make decoctions or infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
